name: MacIntyre Wind Farm
current_developer: Macintyre Windfarm Pty Ltd and Arc Energy Macintyre Pty Ltd
notable: Largest onshore wind farm in southern hemisphere. 162x Nordex N163/5.7MW. A$1.96B. CleanCo 400MW PPA + Stanwell + Ark/Telstra.

timeline.title: Financial close — A$1.96B
timeline.detail: Acciona reached financial close; largest single-site wind farm in southern hemisphere

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Construction began for 162 GE Cypress 5.7 MW turbines

timeline.title: First turbines generating
timeline.detail: Initial turbines connected to Powerlink network

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2025-11 to 2025-11-30 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

eis_specs.document_title: MacIntyre Wind Farm EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Standard 120 m hub height for N163/5.7; high-hub 165 m variant not selected for this site
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: Mean annual wind speed at hub height from WAsP modelling using 5-year met mast data — QLD Southern Downs near Warwick
eis_specs.energy_yield_method: WAsP with ERA5 long-term correction; P50 net yield after wake, availability and electrical losses
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: MacIntyre 275 kV substation (new, built by Powerlink), Southern Downs QLD
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~8 km of new 275 kV line to dedicated MacIntyre substation constructed by Powerlink as part of the Southern Downs transmission augmentation.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: IMPORTANT: Major Powerlink augmentation required — new 275 kV MacIntyre substation constructed plus 45 km of new 275 kV transmission line from MacIntyre substation to Kempsey 275 kV substation. Total transmission investment ~$400 M. One of the largest single connection augmentations in the QLD NEM.
eis_specs.notes: 923 MW (162 × 5.7 MW Nordex N163 Delta4000), Southern Downs QLD near Warwick/Stanthorpe. Developer: Macintyre Windfarm Pty Ltd (ACCIONA Energía) + Arc Energy Macintyre (QLD Gov). Adjacent Karara Wind Farm (102 turbines Nordex N163) is separate but uses shared connection. Commissioning 2024-2025. When fully operational, combined MacIntyre precinct will be among Australia's largest wind installations. QLD EIS approved by Coordinator-General 2021. Nordex N163 Delta4000 is a 5.X platform turbine. Southern Downs is QLD's best onshore wind resource — consistently high capacity factors above 40%.
